programme.title: Jeena Isi Ka Naam Hai
programme.desc: Alia, an aspiring writer, marries a brutal and abusive prince to put an end to her family's misery. She runs away from him and starts a new life when he orders someone to kill their unborn girl child.

programme.title: Kanjoos Makhichoos
programme.desc: A man covertly saves money to fulfil his father's desire to go on the Char Dham Yatra. However, things change when his parents go missing due to heavy floods.

programme.title: Phir Hera Pheri
programme.desc: The lives of Raju, Shyam and Baburao change completely when they get cheated by a fraudster. Desperate to repay a loan from a feared gangster, they scramble to find an alternative solution.

programme.title: Bhoothnath
programme.desc: A rhythmic exchange of silly pranks and shenanigans begins after a young boy and his family move into a house inhabited by a grumpy old ghost.

programme.title: Janhit Mein Jaari
programme.desc: With the will to break taboo as her armour of choice, Mannu embarks to work as a condom salesperson, despite the reservations of her family and society.

programme.title: Attack
programme.desc: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and traumatised with thoughts of his dead lover. When the attacker returns, Arjun puts his life on the line to serve his nation and seek revenge.

programme.title: Article 15
programme.desc: After witnessing rampant caste-based injustice in rural India, a diligent and moral police officer wages war against the system.

programme.title: Partner
programme.desc: A love expert helps a clumsy man win over his dream girl, only to face unexpected twists when he finds himself entangled in his own complicated romance.

programme.title: Mary Kom
programme.desc: When Mary Kom encounters a renowned coach in a boxing gym, she shares her boxing aspirations with him and convinces him to teach her. Despite her father's disapproval, she follows her passion.

programme.title: The Dirty Picture
programme.desc: Reshma, a village girl, achieves immense success in the male-dominated film industry. However, as her career rises, she pays a heavy price for it.

programme.title: ABCD: Any Body Can Dance
programme.desc: Vishnu, a professional choreographer who quit his dance company due to disagreements with his manager, decides to form his own team together to win a major dance competition.

programme.title: Runway 34
programme.desc: Upon dealing with the rough climate in Cochin, two pilots make a risky landing in Thiruvananthapuram. But trouble ensues when personnel from the AAIB probes the matter.
